stages.sql:
SELECT trace_id, span_id, parent_id, payload_type, payload
FROM trace_spans_dist
WHERE trace_id = unhex('00000000000000000000000000000ea6')

shards.pruned_reason: optimize_skip_unused_shards pruned shard 2: none of the queried trace ids map to it (cityHash64(00000000000000000000000000000ea6) = 4034476134512471790, % 2 = 0 -> shard 1)

stages.sql:
SELECT trace_id, max(timestamp_ns) AS bound_ts
FROM trace_spans_dist
PREWHERE service = 'checkout'
WHERE timestamp_ns > 1784145617170476910 AND timestamp_ns <= 1784152817170476910
GROUP BY trace_id
ORDER BY bound_ts DESC, trace_id ASC
LIMIT 100001

SELECT trace_id, max(timestamp_ns) AS bound_ts
FROM trace_attrs_idx_dist
WHERE date >= toDate('2026-07-15') AND date <= toDate('2026-07-15')
  AND timestamp_ns > 1784145617170476910 AND timestamp_ns <= 1784152817170476910
  AND (key = 'http.status_code' AND val_num >= 500 AND scope = 'span')
GROUP BY trace_id
ORDER BY bound_ts DESC, trace_id ASC
LIMIT 100001

SELECT trace_id, span_id, parent_id, service, name, timestamp_ns, duration_ns, status_code, kind
FROM trace_spans_dist
WHERE trace_id IN (unhex('00000000000000000000000000000ea6'), unhex('00000000000000000000000000000f0a'), unhex('00000000000000000000000000000f3c'), unhex('00000000000000000000000000000f6e'))
  AND timestamp_ns > 1784145617170476910 AND timestamp_ns <= 1784152817170476910
ORDER BY trace_id ASC, timestamp_ns ASC, span_id ASC
LIMIT 10001 BY trace_id

SELECT DISTINCT trace_id, span_id
FROM trace_attrs_idx_dist
WHERE date >= toDate('2026-07-15') AND date <= toDate('2026-07-15')
  AND (key = 'http.status_code' AND val_num >= 500 AND scope = 'span')
  AND timestamp_ns > 1784145617170476910 AND timestamp_ns <= 1784152817170476910
  AND trace_id IN (unhex('00000000000000000000000000000ea6'), unhex('00000000000000000000000000000f0a'), unhex('00000000000000000000000000000f3c'), unhex('00000000000000000000000000000f6e'))

SELECT trace_id, span_id, parent_id, service, name, timestamp_ns, duration_ns
FROM trace_spans_dist
WHERE trace_id IN (unhex('00000000000000000000000000000ea6'))

shards.pruned_reason: optimize_skip_unused_shards pruned shard 2: none of the queried trace ids map to it (cityHash64(00000000000000000000000000000ea6) = 4034476134512471790, % 2 = 0 -> shard 1)
